# Access control

Every state-changing function in the Auctions contracts and who may call it. Generated from the per-contract references; the per-function pages carry the full behavior.

## SovereignAuctionHouse

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`createAuction`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#createauction) | owner-only (`onlyOwner`, else `OwnableUnauthorizedAccount`) |
| [`bulkCreateAuctions`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#bulkcreateauctions) | owner-only (`onlyOwner`, else `OwnableUnauthorizedAccount`) |
| [`createBid`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#createbid) | permissionless (payable; any caller may bid, guarded by reserve, increment, and timer checks) |
| [`setAuctionReservePrice`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#setauctionreserveprice) | seller-only (`msg.sender` must be the auction's `tokenOwner`, else the call reverts `Not token owner`) |
| [`cancelAuction`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#cancelauction) | seller-only (`msg.sender` must be the auction's `tokenOwner`, else the call reverts `Not token owner`) |
| [`bulkCancelAuctions`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#bulkcancelauctions) | owner-only (`onlyOwner`, else `OwnableUnauthorizedAccount`) |
| [`endAuction`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#endauction) | permissionless (any caller may settle an ended auction) |
| [`withdrawRefund`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#withdrawrefund) | permissionless (any caller drains only their own credited balance) |
| [`recoverStuckERC721`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#recoverstuckerc721) | owner-only (`onlyOwner`, else `OwnableUnauthorizedAccount`) |
| [`initialize`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#initialize) | deployer one-shot (`initializer`, else `InvalidInitialization`) |
| [`receive`](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house#receive) | permissionless (payable, but always reverts) |

## SovereignAuctionHouseFactory

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`createAuctionHouse`](/docs/auctions/contracts/auction-house-factory#createauctionhouse) | permissionless (anyone may deploy; the new house is owned by `msg.sender`) |
